issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in post-referral and pre-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were enrolling in multiple workflow branches simultaneously, causing home advisors and TCs to receive duplicate tasks across post-referral and pre-referral workflows. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. Madelaine worked with HubSpot support to resolve the filter issue.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or dismiss the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: Home advisors continued receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks (e.g., weekly check-ins) even after deals were marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow lacked proper unenrollment filters for those deal stages. Madelaine made a tweak to the workflow filters to address this.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any stale check-in tasks on deals that were marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Emails showing previous loan officer after LO change on a deal
issues.desc: After a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails continued to display the previous LO's information instead of the updated one. The issue affected at least one deal where the LO was changed to Julie Yocum but emails still referenced Paul. Luis resolved the issue on the same day it was reported.
issues.workaround: For any deals with a recent LO change during the impact window, manually verify that outgoing emails reflect the correct LO and resend if necessary.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering TC tasks when deal stage toggled back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, then back to a prior stage, and then back to Offer Accepted again, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger for the second Offer Accepted transition. The root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was missing from the re-enrollment criteria. Madelaine added it as a re-enrollment trigger.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were toggled back to Offer Accepted during the impact window and did not receive TC tasks.

issues.title: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals being updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering the TC workflow or associated tasks. HAs were having to send closing info collection emails manually. Madelaine worked with HubSpot support and confirmed the issue was resolved, though the exact root cause was not publicly stated.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted during the impact window into the TC workflow to ensure closing tasks are generated.

issues.title: Turbohome Check Status task and extra Call 1 task triggering on workflow enrollment
issues.desc: An unwanted 'Turbohome Check Status' task and an additional 'Call 1' task were being triggered 10 minutes after a lead was placed on a workflow. Home advisors flagged these as unnecessary. Madelaine confirmed they could be turned off and agreed to do so.
issues.workaround: No action needed for past leads; the extraneous tasks can be dismissed manually if they appeared on existing records.
